name: intro computational thinking
summary: The 'intro computational thinking' project is a software initiative designed to introduce fundamental computational thinking concepts through interactive modules. Based on the module summaries provided, this project likely focuses on teaching problem-solving methodologies, algorithmic thinking, and programming fundamentals to beginners. The project appears to be structured around modular learning components that cover core computational thinking skills such as decomposition, pattern recognition, abstraction, and algorithm design. The software likely provides hands-on programming exercises and interactive learning experiences to help users develop logical reasoning and computational problem-solving abilities.
